articles.author: Tucker  Reals
articles.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
articles.description: The U.S. military said Monday that the number of Americans killed during the ongoing conflict with Iran now stands at six. Follow live updates on Day 3 of the war.
articles.content: The head of the United Nations's nuclear watchdog agency, the IAEA, said Monday that his agency had "no indication" that any of Iran's nuclear installations had been damaged by the ongoing Israeli-U.… [+1766 chars]

articles.author: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
articles.title: GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds - NBC News
articles.description: GLP-1 drugs — including Ozempic and Wegovy — may be tied to a slightly higher risk of osteoporosis and gout, according to research presented Monday at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons’ annual meeting.Dr.
